elements.text: FAIR Vocabularies in the DDI Community (1)

DDI Metadata is mostly created (re-created) at data repositories
Controlled vocabularies for concepts, variables, and coding are difficult to apply retroactively
Comparability of international surveys varies widely
Some are designed for comparability (e.g., Demographic and Health Surveys)
Harmonization of similar but uncoordinated surveys requires considerable effort 
Vocabularies and tools are developing
DDI-Lifecycle uses schemas for metadata-driven survey design
CESSDA is developing vocabularies and a question bank
European Language Social Science Thesaurus (ELSST) is a FAIR multilingual thesaurus of social science concepts
